Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Aaron M. Davis, Esq., Branson Brinkop, Griffith & Strong (650) 365-7710 for Moving Party Lexington Insurance Company
Patricia Scott Goodman, Esq., Gordon & Rees LLP (415) 986-5900, for Moving Party Defendant Travelers Indemnity Comapny of Illinois
Wallace M. Tice, Esq., Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer (415) 397-2800, Joinder in Motion To Consolidate on behalf of Defendant Admiral Insurance Company
Heidi Kohn Hugo, Esq., Law Offices of Denis F. Shanagher (415) 383-5001, Joinder in Motion To Consolidate on behalf of Defendant Westchester Fire Insurance Company
Randy M. Marmor, Esq., Sinnott, Dito, Moura & Puebla PC (415) 352-6200, Joinder in Motion To Consolidate on behalf of Defendant Zurich American Insurance Company
Raymond E. Kong, Esq., Bell, Rosenberg & Hughes LLP (510) 832-8585, for Opposing Party Plaintiff NIBBI-DFPF, J.V., NIBBI Bros., Inc. and DFPF Corporation
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT Lexington Insurance Company's Motion For Consolidation is GRANTED; Action numbers 418751, 418754, 418758 and 418756 are consolidated for all purposes; all future filings shall be in #418751. The trial date of June 14, 2004, currently set in action #418751, NIBBI-DFPF et al v. Zurich American Insurance Company, shall remain as set; however, the trial dates in #418754, NIBBI-DFPF v. Travelers, set for 02/23/04, #418758, NIBBI-DFPF, set for 04/05/04 and #418756, NIBBI-DFPF v. ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY, set for 05/03/04 are ordered VACATED. Counsel for Defendant Lexington Insurance Company is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
